name: Sicilian Najdorf
description: The Najdorf is the most celebrated variation of the Sicilian Defense. Black plays ...a6 to prepare ...b5 expansion, fight for the center, and create asymmetrical winning chances. A favorite of both Kasparov and Fischer.

moves.instruction: White opens the king's pawn, claiming central space and clearing lines.
The Sicilian. Black fights for d4 and creates an asymmetrical pawn structure.
Develop and prepare to support d4 against the c5-pawn.
Control e5 and prepare to develop the c8-bishop along the long diagonal.
Open the center — the defining moment of every Open Sicilian.
Trade toward the center. Black gets a half-open c-file for the queenside attack.
Recapture with the knight, centralizing in a single move.
Develop and attack e4, forcing White to clarify the pawn structure.
Defend e4 and complete a piece of development.
The Najdorf. Control b5, prepare ...b5 expansion, and secure the queenside.
A classical setup — develop the bishop and prepare to castle.
Strike in the center. Black gains space and creates a grip on d4.
Retreat the knight — d4 is no longer a comfortable square after ...e5.
Develop and prepare to castle, completing kingside development.
Castle to safety. White is now ready for a kingside initiative.
Black castles too. The main Najdorf tabiya has been reached — both sides race to attack.
